requirement_topic.en: UNBS PVoC Import Conformity — Certificate of Conformity for Electrical, Electronic, and Solar Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: UNBS PVoC进口合格评定——电气、电子及太阳能设备合格证书
requirement_topic.zht: UNBS PVoC進口合格評定——電氣、電子及太陽能設備合格證書

summary.en: UNBS operates Uganda's PVoC programme for goods verified by appointed inspection agents in the country of export. UNBS lists electrical and electronics including solar equipment among categories covered under PVoC. A Chinese PV inverter shipment should therefore be screened for PVoC coverage before export and, where covered, should obtain the required Certificate of Conformity through an appointed PVoC agent before import clearance. The PVoC gate is separate from ERA project licensing and utility connection acceptance.
summary.zh: UNBS实施乌干达PVoC计划，由出口国指定检验机构对货物进行验证。UNBS将包括太阳能设备在内的电气和电子产品列为PVoC覆盖类别。中国光伏逆变器出货前应筛查是否属于PVoC范围；若属于，应在进口清关前通过指定PVoC机构取得所需合格证书。PVoC门槛独立于ERA项目许可和公用事业接入接受。
summary.zht: UNBS實施烏干達PVoC計畫，由出口國指定檢驗機構對貨物進行驗證。UNBS將包括太陽能設備在內的電氣和電子產品列為PVoC覆蓋類別。中國光伏逆變器出貨前應篩查是否屬於PVoC範圍；若屬於，應在進口清關前通過指定PVoC機構取得所需合格證書。PVoC門檻獨立於ERA項目許可和公用事業接入接受。

standards_or_laws: UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme
UNBS PVoC categories — electrical and electronics including solar equipment
UNBS appointed PVoC agents and inspection / clearance regulations
Applicable Uganda Standards (US), including adopted IEC standards where declared or requested

summary.en: China export files commonly include factory test reports, CQC/CGC voluntary certificates, CNAS laboratory reports, CCC-exemption statements where relevant, and GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 evidence. These documents can support PVoC assessment but are not themselves a UNBS Certificate of Conformity and do not bypass the appointed-agent PVoC process.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件通常包括工厂测试报告、CQC/CGC自愿认证、CNAS实验室报告、适用时的CCC豁免说明，以及GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004证据。这些文件可支持PVoC评定，但其本身不是UNBS合格证书，也不能绕过指定机构PVoC流程。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件通常包括工廠測試報告、CQC/CGC自願認證、CNAS實驗室報告、適用時的CCC豁免說明，以及GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004證據。這些文件可支持PVoC評定，但其本身不是UNBS合格證書，也不能繞過指定機構PVoC流程。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
Chinese voluntary CQC / CGC PV inverter certification and CNAS laboratory reports

gap.en: Gap: PVoC is a shipment and import-clearance gate, not just a product-standard comparison. Exporters should confirm HS code and product category with UNBS or the appointed PVoC agent, provide model-specific safety, EMC, label, manual, and test evidence, and secure the Certificate of Conformity before shipping goods that fall within PVoC coverage.
gap.zh: 差距：PVoC是出货和进口清关门槛，不只是产品标准对照。出口商应与UNBS或指定PVoC机构确认HS编码和产品类别，提交特定型号的安全、EMC、标签、说明书和测试证据，并在属于PVoC范围的货物装运前取得合格证书。
gap.zht: 差距：PVoC是出貨和進口清關門檻，不只是產品標準對照。出口商應與UNBS或指定PVoC機構確認HS編碼和產品類別，提交特定型號的安全、EMC、標籤、說明書和測試證據，並在屬於PVoC範圍的貨物裝運前取得合格證書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for imported goods that fall within UNBS PVoC coverage; Certificate of Conformity is a practical import-clearance gate.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — Chinese certificates and test reports support assessment but are not UNBS PVoC Certificates of Conformity.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm PVoC coverage before export because UNBS lists electrical and electronic goods including solar equipment under PVoC. A China GB/T or CQC/CGC file can support review but does not replace the UNBS-appointed-agent Certificate of Conformity process.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出口前应确认PVoC覆盖范围，因为UNBS将包括太阳能设备在内的电气和电子货物列入PVoC范围。中国GB/T或CQC/CGC文件可支持审查，但不能替代UNBS指定机构合格证书流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出口前應確認PVoC覆蓋範圍，因為UNBS將包括太陽能設備在內的電氣和電子貨物列入PVoC範圍。中國GB/T或CQC/CGC文件可支持審查，但不能替代UNBS指定機構合格證書流程。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — PV Inverter Electrical Safety
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——光伏逆变器电气安全
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——光伏逆變器電氣安全

summary.en: PV inverter safety evidence for Uganda should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2, the IEC safety standards for power converters used in photovoltaic power systems and the inverter-specific requirements. UNBS may adopt IEC standards as Uganda Standards, and project owners, utilities, lenders, EPC contractors, or PVoC agents may request IEC 62109 type-test certificates for the specific inverter model or family. Safety evidence should be model-specific and should cover ratings, environmental limits, protection class, markings, manuals, and installation constraints.
summary.zh: 乌干达光伏逆变器安全证据应围绕IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2准备，即光伏电力系统用功率变换器及逆变器特殊要求的IEC安全标准。UNBS可将IEC标准采纳为乌干达标准，项目业主、公用事业、贷款方、EPC承包商或PVoC机构可能要求特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109型式试验证书。安全证据应针对具体型号，并覆盖额定值、环境限制、防护等级、标识、说明书和安装约束。
summary.zht: 烏干達光伏逆變器安全證據應圍繞IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2準備，即光伏電力系統用功率轉換器及逆變器特殊要求的IEC安全標準。UNBS可將IEC標準採納為烏干達標準，項目業主、公用事業、貸款方、EPC承包商或PVoC機構可能要求特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109型式試驗證書。安全證據應針對具體型號，並覆蓋額定值、環境限制、防護等級、標識、說明書和安裝約束。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
UNBS Uganda Standards adoption and PVoC conformity assessment where applicable
ERA, utility, lender, EPC, and project-owner technical specifications

summary.en: China-side evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, factory routine tests, and voluntary Chinese PV inverter certificates. These documents may address safety topics but should not be treated as IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates unless the report explicitly states IEC 62109 compliance for the exact model and configuration.
summary.zh: 中国侧证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工厂例行测试和中国自愿性光伏逆变器证书。这些文件可能涉及安全主题，但除非报告明确声明针对确切型号和配置符合IEC 62109，否则不应视为IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。
summary.zht: 中國側證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工廠例行測試和中國自願性光伏逆變器證書。這些文件可能涉及安全主題，但除非報告明確聲明針對確切型號和配置符合IEC 62109，否則不應視為IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
Factory routine and outgoing inspection reports

gap.en: Gap: Chinese domestic safety evidence does not automatically prove IEC 62109-1/-2 compliance for Uganda. Exporters should obtain or map IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence from a competent accredited laboratory, check that the model family and firmware version are covered, and align labels and manuals to the PVoC and project technical file.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内安全证据不会自动证明乌干达IEC 62109-1/-2合规。出口商应取得或映射来自有资质认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，确认型号系列和固件版本被覆盖，并使标签和说明书与PVoC及项目技术文件一致。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內安全證據不會自動證明烏干達IEC 62109-1/-2合規。出口商應取得或映射來自有資質認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，確認型號系列和韌體版本被覆蓋，並使標籤和說明書與PVoC及項目技術文件一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where incorporated into Uganda Standards, PVoC assessment, utility/project specifications, lender requirements, or owner procurement documents; strongly expected for bankable grid-tied PV inverter packages.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T or voluntary certification evidence is not automatically equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 62109-1/-2 as the core safety evidence package for Uganda PV inverter review unless the current UNBS, PVoC agent, utility, or project owner specifies a different accepted route. China GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 files should be mapped, not assumed equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非现行UNBS、PVoC机构、公用事业或项目业主指定其他可接受路径，应将IEC 62109-1/-2作为乌干达光伏逆变器审查的核心安全证据包。中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004文件应进行映射，而非假定等效。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非現行UNBS、PVoC機構、公用事業或項目業主指定其他可接受路徑，應將IEC 62109-1/-2作為烏干達光伏逆變器審查的核心安全證據包。中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004文件應進行映射，而非假定等效。
